title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Lodha & Co

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Lodha & Co
jsonLd.description:
Lodha & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lodha & Co:
Lodha & Co is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co!
